text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Assistive Technology Information 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ACCESS TECHNOLOGIES INC OREGON'S STATEWIDE ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services in regard to acquiring assistive technology including equpiment loans, assistance in finding funding for such items, and specialized information and referral. 2225 Lancaster Drive NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 361-1201 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY VISION INC ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY LAB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers consultations on communication, mobility, and smart home technology for individuals with disabilities. Additionally, facilitates social support groups and provides training on assistive technology. Eligibility: Adults and children with disabilities Hours: By appointment: Monday 9am-5pm Walk-in: Thursday noon-5pm; call to confirm Email (503) 292-4964 152 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ACCESS TECHNOLOGIES INC OREGON'S STATEWIDE ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY PROGRAM
